action.reasoning: Observation: ResNet-50 ERM baseline reaches ~65.8% source val but only 12.37% target (iter1); iter2 with grayscale/colorjitter augs + cosine schedule gave slightly lower source val (64.55%) and worse target (11.18%). ~1h per 10 epochs on 4xGPU. Analysis: Large domain gap to Quickdraw line drawings not bridged well by current augs/backbone; transformer backbones often generalize better in DG papers. Decision: Switch to timm ViT-B/16 augreg_in1k (86M, paper-used supervised IN-1k transformer for DomainNet), AdamW optimizer (lr=1e-4), stronger augs (RandAugment + higher grayscale prob), 20 epochs with cosine LR (within rule), reduce train/predict batch to 128 for ViT memory safety, update model/predict/train accordingly then submit_eval for new baseline.
